channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Wed May 13: Focus on multimodal reasoning and inference efficiency
item.description: Today's research highlights advancements in multimodal reasoning with datasets like Open-MM-RL, while also addressing inference efficiency through techniques like KV-Fold for long-context processing. These developments are crucial for enhancing AI systems in safety-critical applications.
